changelog:
Dashboard: 'Credits Used' card now shows account-true usage.

The stat used to display the proxy's internal run-time counter (h.totalCredits, an atomic counter incremented per request through THIS proxy instance). That number naturally diverged from the original upstream proxy because each instance has handled different requests since startup.

It now displays the sum of usageCurrent across all accounts as reported by Kiro's /getUsageLimits endpoint — the actual credits consumed on the accounts themselves, which matches between the original proxy and any fork running against the same accounts. Falls back to the proxy run-time counter if quota data hasn't loaded yet.

A7: backend multi API keys with per-key daily limits.
A6: security + reliability hardening.
A5: drop Claude Code system prompt entirely when detected.
A4: drop ThinkingModePrompt; split filter chain.
A3: drop --- SYSTEM PROMPT --- markers; structured tool results only.
A2: kiro-go-patch container_name + pull_policy: always.
A1: <system-reminder>/x-anthropic-billing-header strip; /v1/responses; model id echo.
